name: Lentil Soup with Liver Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------LIVER DUMPLINGS------------------------------
100 grams Chicken liver (3.5 oz)
40 grams Butter (1.5 oz)
80 grams Bread crumbs (2.75 oz)
2 Egg yolks
1 Egg white
1. Heat butter in a pan, sauté onion and bacon until lightly browned.
2. Add leek and lentils; cook for a moment.
3. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a boil.
4. Simmer until lentils are tender (about 20-25 minutes).
5. Skin the liver and press through a fine sieve into a bowl.
6. Beat butter until smooth, then add liver mixture.
7. Stir in egg yolks and bread crumbs; season with salt and pepper.
8. Beat egg white until stiff and fold into liver mixture.
9. In a skillet, bring water to a simmer and add salt.
10. Form dumplings (about 2 teaspoons each) and poach for 5 minutes.
11. Remove dumplings from water and place in a bowl of cold water.
12. Blend the soup liquid in another container.
13. Strain the soup through a sieve back into the saucepan.
14. Return to simmer, add whipping cream, and heat until hot.
15. Correct seasoning if needed, then gently fold in the dumplings and serve.
